Paragraph
(4.5.4) can also rewritten as
\begin{equation*} \left[D{\mathbf f}({\mathbf x}_{0})\right]^{-1}\left[{\mathbf y}_{2}- {\mathbf y}_{1}\right]= {\mathbf x}_2 - {\mathbf x}_1- \left[\phi({\mathbf x}_2)-\phi({\mathbf x}_1)\right], \end{equation*}
where \(\phi\) is defined with respect to either \({\mathbf y}_{1}\) or \({\mathbf y}_{2}\) and satisfies (4.5.3). This would lead to the same conclusion as (4.5.5).
in-context
